translations.Architected and scaled a global shipping: Architected and scaled a global shipping API (Laravel Lumen) for Envia.com, integrating international logistics providers via RESTful APIs. Optimized core backend performance and deployed features to streamline global logistics workflows.

Built internal APIs for car service endpoints and integrated platforms like Parts Tech, Stripe, and Facturapi. Translated automotive industry requirements into technical specifications and implemented TDD and SCRUM methodologies.

editorsChoice.title: Menlo Ventures Secures Victorious $3B Fund Following Anthropic Success
editorsChoice.ai_summary: Menlo Ventures has successfully raised a staggering $3 billion fund, solidifying its standing as a premier investor in the artificial intelligence sector. This monumental achievement, fueled by its success with companies like Anthropic, positions the firm to champion the next wave of technological innovation.

editorsChoice.title: LastPass Hackers Seize Customer Support Data in Double Breach
editorsChoice.ai_summary: On June 23, 2026, attackers exploited a breach at LastPass partner Klue to access customer support tickets containing stored passwords. The incident exposes thousands of users and has prompted an immediate investigation by LastPass.

editorsChoice.title: Steam Machine Officially Launches
editorsChoice.ai_summary: Valve launches the Steam Machine, a console that streams Steam games to any TV. Its dual-core CPU, custom GPU, and detachable controller bring PC gaming home.

articles.title: Steam Machine Officially Launches
articles.ai_summary: Valve launches the Steam Machine, a console that streams Steam games to any TV. Its dual-core CPU, custom GPU, and detachable controller bring PC gaming home.

articles.title: Apple's Siri Overhauled with 'Siri AI': First Impressions
articles.ai_summary: Apple has officially entered the advanced AI race by overhauling its voice assistant, now called 'Siri AI', as part of the upcoming iOS 27. This new version promises a more natural, conversational experience, allowing Siri to understand context and handle complex, back-and-forth interactions without needing repeated information.

articles.title: John Jumper Leaves DeepMind for Anthropic to Lead AI Development
articles.ai_summary: Nobel Prize winner John Jumper is leaving Google's DeepMind to join rival company Anthropic, marking a major shift in the AI talent race. His departure comes after years of groundbreaking work at Deep...

articles.title: Apple Unveils Key New Features in iOS 27 Update
articles.ai_summary: Apple’s iOS 27 drops a suite of powerful upgrades that push iPhone photography and battery endurance to new heights. With context‑savvy Siri, hardened privacy controls, richer messaging tools and lightning‑quick app launches, developers gain fresh levers to craft smarter, more engaging apps.

articles.title: VLC Creator Jean-Baptiste Kempf Unveils Kyber for Real-Time Robot Control
articles.ai_summary: The creator of the ubiquitous VLC media player, Jean-Baptiste Kempf, has unveiled Kyber, a groundbreaking new system poised to transform real-time robot control. This project aims to bring VLC's renowned simplicity and efficiency to the complex world of remote machine operation, making it faster and easier than ever before.

articles.title: Go Raises ¥88.6 Billion in Japan’s Largest IPO of 2026 to Accelerate Robotaxi Rollout
articles.ai_summary: Go, Japan's leading ride-hailing company, raised a record ¥88.6 billion in Japan’s largest IPO, accelerating its fleet of autonomous taxis.

articles.title: Hyundai Acquires Boston Dynamics in Major Robotics Play
articles.ai_summary: Hyundai Motor Group has officially acquired Boston Dynamics, signaling a major commitment to advanced robotics and AI. This strategic move positions Hyundai at the forefront of automated manufacturing and the future of intelligent machines.

articles.title: Ambani's AI Push: India's Telecom Giant Aims to Weave AI into 500 Million Users' Lives
articles.ai_summary: Mukesh Ambani and his company Reliance are putting artificial intelligence (AI) into their telecom services. This move will bring AI tools to over 500 million users across India. AI Integration Plan E...

trendingArticles.title: US Investigates ASML Chip Tool's Presence in China; ASML Denies Violation
trendingArticles.ai_summary: The US is investigating whether advanced ASML chip-making machines have reached China, sparking concerns over potential export restriction violations. ASML denies any wrongdoing amidst the intensifying probe.
